title: Legislative Decree No. 56 of 2018 in Respect of Providing Cloud Computing Services to Foreign Parties
summary: Adjacent cloud and data infrastructure instrument that affects handling of customer data hosted in Bahrain and is relevant where hosted customer data includes personal data subject to PDPL or foreign-party data protection requirements.

theme_notes.data_privacy.personal_data_protection: Regulates cloud services supplied from Bahrain to foreign parties.
theme_notes.data_privacy.crossborder_data_flows: Creates a legal framework for hosting foreign-party cloud data in Bahrain.
theme_notes.telecom_digital_infrastructure.cloud_dat: Legal framework for cloud services supplied from Bahrain to foreign customers.
